issue_summary: track isDeterministic privately in LA; also remove states not reachable from initial node in removeDeadStates; move prefix handling into LevA
javadoc_before:
/**
   * Returns the set of live states. A state is "live" if an accept state is
   * reachable from it.
   * 
   * @return set of {@link State} objects
   */
javadoc_after:
/**
   * Returns the set of live states. A state is "live" if an accept state is
   * reachable from it and if it is reachable from the initial state.
   */
